## getGroupArray() function

> This API is provided as a preview for developers and may change based on feedback that we receive. Do not use this API in a production environment.
> 

根据指定的键或条件将数组元素分组

**Signature:**

```typescript
declare function getGroupArray<T>(array: T[], groupBy: keyof T | ((item: T) => string | number)): T[][];
```

## Parameters

|  Parameter | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  array | T\[\] | 原数组 |
|  groupBy | keyof T \| ((item: T) =&gt; string \| number) | 分组键或分组函数 |

**Returns:**

T\[\]\[\]

分组后的二维数组，每个子数组代表一个分组

## Example


```JavaScript
// 根据属性分组
getGroupArray([{age: 20, name: 'a'}, {age: 20, name: 'b'}, {age: 30, name: 'c'}], 'age');
// => [[{age: 20, name: 'a'}, {age: 20, name: 'b'}], [{age: 30, name: 'c'}]]

// 根据条件分组
getGroupArray([1, 2, 3, 4, 5], num => num % 2 === 0 ? 'even' : 'odd');
// => [[1, 3, 5], [2, 4]]
```
